subject: [PATCH 3/3] cgroup: replace global cgroup_file_kn_lock with per-cgroup_file lock

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified potential issues with the new lock implementation, specifically regarding concurrent access to cgroup directories. Requested further clarification on the design and its implications for existing code paths.

2026-02-28.patch_summary: This patch series replaces the global cgroup_file_kn_lock with a per-cgroup_file spinlock to eliminate cross-cgroup contention and improve performance.
